scripts.copy-assets-linux: cp -r src/renderer/pages dist/renderer/pages && cp src/renderer/styles.css dist/renderer/styles.css
scripts.copy-assets-mac: cp -r src/renderer/pages dist/renderer/pages && cp src/renderer/styles.css dist/renderer/styles.css
scripts.copy-assets-windows: xcopy /E /I /H src\renderer\pages\ dist\renderer\pages\ && xcopy /I /H src\renderer\styles.css dist\renderer\styles.css
